output_protocol.semantic_best_anchor: Global pure-semantic best anchor from requirement-unit matching.
output_protocol.semantic_top_k: Compact semantic candidate list for reuse.
output_protocol.semantic_explanation: Requirement-unit hit explanation and hard-gap summary.
output_protocol.company_best_anchor: Same-company continuity anchor from the auxiliary channel.
output_protocol.company_score: Company continuity score, not part of the semantic teacher.
output_protocol.delta_summary: Why the semantic anchor and company anchor differ, and how downstream should combine them.
output_protocol.writer_input: Downstream-ready payload with primary semantic anchor and optional continuity anchor.

dynamic_ingest_policy.index_new_job: Immediate live indexing into jobs_by_id, pattern_index, member_index, combo_index, surface_token_index, and company_index.
dynamic_ingest_policy.dedupe: Exact near-duplicates merge by company/title/pattern/canonical fingerprint.
dynamic_ingest_policy.quarantine: Low-signal jobs with sparse semantics and heavy pending surface text are isolated from the main pool.
dynamic_ingest_policy.alias_absorption: New surface tokens enter the pending alias queue and are absorbed offline after review.
dynamic_ingest_policy.taxonomy_rebuild: Accepted alias and taxonomy changes require offline rebuild; job indexing does not.

disallowed_mutations: same_company bias injection into semantic teacher
duplicate shortcut injection into semantic teacher
title-normalization shortcut promotion into semantic teacher
